name: AutoDrawingsStatusEnum
summary: The status of the AutoDrawing script execution.

enum_values.name: OPERATION_OK
enum_values.summary: The AutoDrawing script was executed without errors.

enum_values.name: OPERATION_FAILED
enum_values.summary: An error occured during the AutoDrawing script execution. See the AutoDrawing log file for more details.

enum_values.name: ERROR_NUMBERING_NOT_UPTODATE
enum_values.summary: The AutoDrawing script could not be executed because the numbering was not up-to-date.

enum_values.name: ERROR_DRAWING_EDITOR_MUST_BE_CLOSED
enum_values.summary: The command could not be executed because a drawing was open. Close the drawing and try again.
